M1.rationale_snippet: # Recommendation: Option B — Encrypted Cloud with No Training

M2.rationale_snippet: I recommend **Option B: encrypted cloud processing with no training on user health data** as the primary policy.

M3.rationale_snippet: I strongly recommend **Option B (Encrypted cloud with no training)** as the optimal data privacy policy for the new AI health coach. M4.rationale_snippet: I recommend **Option D: Cloud with opt-in training only**. This policy strikes the optimal balance for a health app that must deliver high-quality AI coaching while building user trust and navigating stringent privacy regulations.

M5.rationale_snippet: I recommend **Option D: Cloud with opt-in training only**. hidden_disagreement.interpretation: Moderate hidden disagreement: 3 agents recommended option B but differ on framing (mean RMSE = 0.76). Worth probing what each is emphasizing.

blind_spots.summary: No obvious blind spots detected in construct space.

risk_surface.note: Risks listed here were extracted by pattern matching on agent free responses. They are minority signals worth probing before acting on consensus.

operator_questions: Agents M1 (neutral), M2 (neutral), M3 (neutral) agreed on option B - but their reasoning differs (diversity=0.76). Which framing will drive execution? Different framings will produce different execution paths.
headline: Partial consensus on option B (3/5); remaining agents split. Worth probing the dissent before acting.
